creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Schemas seems to be listed in pkg-plist instead of GLIB_SCHEMAS in sysutils/tracker-miners.

Running `glib-compile-schemas /usr/local/share/glib-2.0/schemas` manually fix the issue for me (yet I have some glitches that are probably unrelated).

So to fix this we have to:
1. Fix sysutils/tracker-miners to register schemas properly;
2. Add sysutils/tracker-miners as a dependency to x11-fm/nautilus.
